description_long: This is a bright red kettlebell-style dumbbell with a smooth, rounded body and a large, arched handle. The handle is thick and ergonomically shaped, allowing for a comfortable grip with one or both hands. Around the lower portion of the body, there are two subtle horizontal grooves that add visual interest and may provide extra grip. On the front, a circular badge displays the weight marking '10KG' in white text, set within a slightly recessed area. The surface appears to be made of a durable, slightly glossy plastic or rubber coating, likely encasing a denser core for weight. The overall condition is pristine, with no visible scratches, dents, or signs of wear.
description: A bright red, smooth kettlebell-style dumbbell with a large arched handle and a '10KG' weight marking on the front. The surface is glossy and appears new, with subtle grooves and a circular badge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the '10KG' weight marking on a circular badge and the full handle arch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the rounded body, with grooves visible on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted back of the dumbbell with no markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the handle's arch and the body grooves.
attribute_handle_type: Large, rounded arch handle with a circular cross-section, smooth surface, and ergonomic thickness for gripping.
attribute_end_cap_design: Rounded end caps integrated into the body, smooth and seamless with subtle horizontal grooves, made of the same red material.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Weight marking '10KG' is visible on the front circular badge, printed in white text.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, scratches, or damage.
